title: wenzelia platysperma
intro: Wenzelia platysperma, also known as the Wenzelia plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is native to the Philippines and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Wenzelia platysperma is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are prepared by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or using a solvent like ethanol to extract its active compounds.
